is a tournament organised by '''NODWIN Gaming''' and '''Rooter''' for teams in {{Flag|in}} India with a total prize pool of ₹27,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{BroadcasterCard|position=Commentator |lang=in |b1=Ocean |b2=KRaT |b3=SuperJonny }} ===Format=== * '''League Stage:''''' June 21st -28th ** 32 Total teams. ** 28 invited teams , {{bgcolortext|stayup|Top 4}} teams from open qualifiers. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16}} teams qualify for ''Finals''. ** Round-robin format. * '''Finals:''''' June 29th -July 2nd ** 16 teams . ** 6
